initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST((ym2012.Consumption - ym2013.Consumption) AS REAL) / ym2012.Consumption AS ConsumptionDecreaseRate
FROM transactions_1k t
JOIN yearmonth ym2012 ON t.CustomerID = ym2012.CustomerID AND ym2012.Date LIKE '2012%'
JOIN yearmonth ym2013 ON t.CustomerID = ym2013.CustomerID AND ym2013.Date LIKE '2013%'
WHERE t.Date = '2012-08-25' AND t.Amount = 634.8;

SELECT 
    (ym2012.Consumption - ym2013.Consumption) * 1.0 / ym2012.Consumption AS ConsumptionDecreaseRate
FROM transactions_1k t
JOIN yearmonth ym2012 ON t.CustomerID = ym2012.CustomerID AND ym2012.Date LIKE '2012%'
JOIN yearmonth ym2013 ON t.CustomerID = ym2013.CustomerID AND ym2013.Date LIKE '2013%'
WHERE t.Date = '2012-08-25' AND t.Amount = 634.8;

WITH customer_2012 AS (
    SELECT ym.Consumption AS Consumption2012
    FROM yearmonth ym
    JOIN transactions_1k t ON ym.CustomerID = t.CustomerID
    WHERE t.Date = '2012-08-25' AND t.Amount = 634.8 AND ym.Date LIKE '2012%'
),
customer_2013 AS (
    SELECT ym.Consumption AS Consumption2013
    FROM yearmonth ym
    JOIN transactions_1k t ON ym.CustomerID = t.CustomerID
    WHERE t.Date = '2012-08-25' AND t.Amount = 634.8 AND ym.Date LIKE '2013%'
)
SELECT 
    (CAST(c2012.Consumption2012 - c2013.Consumption2013 AS REAL) / c2012.Consumption2012) * 100 AS ConsumptionDecreaseRate
FROM customer_2012 c2012, customer_2013 c2013;

SELECT 
    (ym2012.Consumption - ym2013.Consumption) * 1.0 / ym2012.Consumption AS ConsumptionDecreaseRate
FROM transactions_1k t
JOIN yearmonth ym2012 ON t.CustomerID = ym2012.CustomerID
JOIN yearmonth ym2013 ON t.CustomerID = ym2013.CustomerID
WHERE 
    t.Date = '2012-08-25' 
    AND t.Amount = 634.8
    AND ym2012.Date LIKE '2012%'
    AND ym2013.Date LIKE '2013%';

WITH customer_2012_2013 AS (
    SELECT 
        t.CustomerID,
        y1.Consumption AS Consumption_2012,
        y2.Consumption AS Consumption_2013
    FROM transactions_1k t
    JOIN yearmonth y1 ON t.CustomerID = y1.CustomerID
    JOIN yearmonth y2 ON t.CustomerID = y2.CustomerID
    WHERE t.Date = '2012-08-25'
      AND t.Amount = 634.8
      AND y1.Date LIKE '2012%'
      AND y2.Date LIKE '2013%'
)
SELECT 
    (Consumption_2012 - Consumption_2013) * 1.0 / Consumption_2012 AS ConsumptionDecreaseRate
FROM customer_2012_2013;

aggregation.selected_sql:
WITH customer_2012_2013 AS (
    SELECT 
        t.CustomerID,
        y1.Consumption AS Consumption_2012,
        y2.Consumption AS Consumption_2013
    FROM transactions_1k t
    JOIN yearmonth y1 ON t.CustomerID = y1.CustomerID
    JOIN yearmonth y2 ON t.CustomerID = y2.CustomerID
    WHERE t.Date = '2012-08-25'
      AND t.Amount = 634.8
      AND y1.Date LIKE '2012%'
      AND y2.Date LIKE '2013%'
)
SELECT 
    (Consumption_2012 - Consumption_2013) * 1.0 / Consumption_2012 AS ConsumptionDecreaseRate
FROM customer_2012_2013;
